overlap_notes: Mount Sinai Crohn's and Colitis Registry adult biopsy RNA-seq family. GEO identifies GSE193677 as MSCCR prospective cross-sectional adult IBD/control cohort with 2490 biopsy RNA-seq samples. No public evidence found tying this row to another current registry cohort-family row; count as independent unless a future MSCCR-derived duplicate is added.

RISK pediatric inception-cohort ileal RNA-seq family. GEO sample titles use CCFA_Risk IDs and the JCI publication states samples came from the RISK study. Same broad RISK family as DS040/DS041; public records do not prove exact subject overlap or independence across RISK accessions, so do not sum cohort counts as independent without subject-level reconciliation.

Leuven/TARGID IBD epithelial-barrier mucosal microarray family. GEO lists colon and terminal/neo-ileum biopsies from UC, CD, and controls on GPL6244. Same broad Leuven/TARGID environment as some treatment-response rows, but no public subject/sample crosswalk or accession evidence proves overlap with current registry rows; count as independent while retaining source-family label.

Genentech EMBARK cross-sectional IBD mucosal microarray family. GEO identifies active/inactive lesion biopsies from CD, UC, and non-IBD controls across ileum/colon on Agilent GPL6480. No public evidence found for subject/sample overlap with DS065 or other current rows; count as independent.

Genentech/Edinburgh UC regional colon-expression microarray family. GEO GSE11223 and PMID 18523026 describe UC and control colon biopsies across anatomic regions on GPL1708. Same company submitter as DS016 but different study, disease scope, platform, publication, and sample labels; no public evidence of overlap with DS016. Count as independent.
